title: Tide Display Configuration
description: Configuration for the Tide Display plugin. Requires a NOAA station ID for your nearest coastal station.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Tide Display plugin

station_id.title: NOAA Station ID
station_id.description: 7-digit NOAA tide station ID. Find yours at tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov/stations.html

station_name.title: Station Name (optional)
station_name.description: Display name override — leave blank to use the station ID

display_duration.title: Seconds per Mode
display_duration.description: How many seconds to show each display mode before rotating to the next

show_moon_phase.title: Show Moon Phase
show_moon_phase.description: Show moon phase icon and name on the stats screen

tide_color.title: Water Color
tide_color.description: RGB color for tide water fill [R, G, B]

highlight_color.title: Highlight / Wave Color
highlight_color.description: RGB color for wave crests and chart line [R, G, B]
